specs.title: 1️⃣ Save authentication state after login

stdout.text: 📝 TEST: Save authentication state after login
Step 3: Wait for inventory page to load
Step 4: Saving storage state to disk

specs.title: 2️⃣ Reuse storage state across tests (without re-login)

stdout.text: 📝 TEST: Reuse storage state (speed up by skipping login)
Step 1: Create context with saved storage state
Step 2: Navigate directly to inventory (no login needed!)
Step 3: Verify authentication by checking page content

specs.title: 3️⃣ Storage state isolation between contexts

stdout.text: 📝 TEST: Storage state isolation between contexts
Step 2: Try to access inventory in Context B (no login)
Step 3: Verify Context A is still authenticated
